description.para: Register offsets for the XI2S_Transmitter device.

sectiondef.header: Core Configuration Register masks and shifts

briefdescription.para: Maximum number of channels bit shift.

sectiondef.header: Core Control Register masks and shifts

briefdescription.para: AES Block Complete Interrupt bit shift.
AES Block Synchronization Error Interrupt bit shift.
AES Block Synchronization Error Interrupt mask.
AES Channel Status Updated Interrupt bit shift.
AES Channel Status Updated Interrupt mask.
Audio Underflow Detected Interrupt bit shift.

sectiondef.header: I2S Timing Control Register masks and shifts
Audio Channel Control Register masks and shifts

briefdescription.para: This macro reads a value from a I2S Transmitter register.

detaileddescription.para: A 32 bit read is performed. If the component is implemented in a smaller width, only the least significant data is read from the register. The most significant data will be read as 0.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the I2S Transmitter core instance.
is the register offset of the register (defined at the top of this file).

simplesect.para: C-style signature: u32 XI2S_Tx_ReadReg(u32 BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset)

briefdescription.para: This macro writes a value to a I2S Transmitter register.

detaileddescription.para: A 32 bit write is performed. If the component is implemented in a smaller width, only the least significant data is written.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the I2S Transmitter core instance.
is the register offset of the register (defined at the top of this file) to be written.
is the 32-bit value to write into the register.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XI2S_Tx_WriteReg(u32 BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset, u32 Data)
